name: Cuban Black Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Dijon mustard or other strong-flavored mustard
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and soak the black beans overnight in water.
2. Drain and rinse the beans before cooking.
3. The next day, sauté the onion and green pepper until soft.
4. Add the soaked beans to a large pot with the remaining soaking water.
5. Stir in the garlic, oregano, cumin, bay leaves, mustard, vinegar, red wine, pimento, red pepper flakes, and sea salt.
6. If using kombu, add it to the pot as well.
7. Cover the pot and simmer until the beans are tender.
8. Serve over rice with chopped onions on top.
